A Journey of 25 Years
Milestones of Love
2001
The Beginning ✨
Two hearts found each other and chose to walk the same path — a promise made for eternity.
2005
A New Chapter 🏠
A house became a home, filled with warmth, laughter, and the beginning of your beautiful family.

🎂 Celebrations
Every Moment Worth Celebrating
Cake Time 🎂
1 / 5
"

Dear Mom & Dad,

Watching you both over the years has taught me what true love really looks like — not the kind from fairy tales, but the real kind. The kind that shows up every morning, holds on through the hard days, and laughs loudly on the good ones.

Twenty-five years of partnership, of patience, of unwavering devotion. You are my greatest example of what it means to truly love someone. Today, on your Silver Jubilee, I celebrate you — not just as my parents, but as two extraordinary souls who found each other and made the whole world brighter for it.

— With all my love 💛
"Here's to 25 years of love, laughter, and happily ever after"
💛 🤍 💛 🤍 💛

Happy Silver Jubilee • May 25
